channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Edmonton apartment building fire causes significant damage
item.description: A fire broke out in a north Edmonton apartment building on July 14, 2026, prompting emergency responders to combat the blaze. The incident, which occurred in the early morning hours, resulted in struc...

item.title: Ike Barinholtz Jokes About Mitch McConnell's Photo During 'Jimmy Kimmel Live' Appearance
item.description: During a recent episode of 'Jimmy Kimmel Live,' guest host Ike Barinholtz made a pointed remark about a new photo of Senator Mitch McConnell, who had been hospitalized for nearly a month. Barinholtz q...

item.title: Tamil Nadu CM launches development projects and inaugurates MLA office in Perambur
item.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay inaugurated his MLA office in Perambur constituency on July 13, 2026, marking his first official visit to the area since winning the 2026 Assembly election. T...

item.title: Court Sentences Bandit’s Ally to 20 Years in Prison
item.description: The Federal High Court in Abuja has sentenced Muhammad Sani, an associate of notorious bandit Danranmi, to 20 years in prison for concealing information that could have led to Danranmi's arrest. Judge...

item.title: Sudan Crisis Escalates as UN Warns of Catastrophic Levels; South Africa and Global Updates
item.description: The United Nations has issued a dire warning that the humanitarian crisis in Sudan has reached catastrophic levels, with over 59,000 civilians killed and 14 million displaced since 2024. Fighting betw...

item.title: Court reduces TUK student compensation to KSh 50k each over missing exam scripts
item.description: Twenty-one former Technical University of Kenya (TUK) students received reduced compensation after the Court of Appeal slashed their award from Sh148,764 to Sh50,000 per student. The case stems from a...

item.title: Amref International University and Beyond Zero Initiative to Establish Teaching Hospital in Nairobi
item.description: Amref International University has partnered with the Beyond Zero Initiative, led by former First Lady Margaret Kenyatta, to establish a specialized teaching hospital focused on maternal and child hea...

item.title: Tanzania's Budget Reforms Aim to Address Gender Imbalance
item.description: The article discusses how Tanzania's budget reforms could address gender imbalance by integrating gender considerations into public spending. Experts warn that current budget allocations fail to addre...

item.title: Ontario Faces Crisis as Educational Assistant Shortage Threatens Student Support
item.description: Ontario education workers and parents are raising alarms over a province-wide shortage of educational assistants (EAs), which is leaving vulnerable students unsupported and forcing classroom evacuatio...

item.title: Government Condemns Illegal Initiation Schools in South Africa
item.description: The South African government has strongly condemned illegal initiation schools, which are undermining the integrity of traditional practices through criminal activities. Cooperative Governance and Tra...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Pushes for Full Digitization of Remittances and Cashless Economy
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has directed the government to fully digitize remittances from abroad as part of efforts to transition Pakistan's economy toward a cashless and digital payments-based sys...

item.title: Kejriwal Seeks Meeting with PM on E20 Petrol Concerns, Calls for Pure Petrol Option
item.description: Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal has written to Prime Minister Narendra Modi seeking a meeting to address concerns regarding the implementation of E20 petrol. In the letter, Kejriwal has demanded ...

item.title: Zambales Expands Marine Conservation Efforts with New Protected Areas
item.description: The Zambales province has officially added two new marine protected areas (MPAs) to its network, enhancing efforts to conserve marine biodiversity and promote sustainable fisheries. The Calanga Reef M...

item.title: Northern Territory Police release previously unseen investigation photos on 25th anniversary of Peter Falconio murder
item.description: Twenty-five years after the murder of British backpacker Peter Falconio in the remote Australian outback, Northern Territory Police have released a series of previously unseen photographs from the inv...

item.title: Green Party's Tayte Willows Wins P.E.I. By-Election
item.description: The Green Party's Tayte Willows has secured victory in the Prince Edward Island byelection, overcoming the incumbent Liberal leader. This result marks a significant shift in provincial politics, refle...

item.title: Stock Market Plummets as US-Iran Tensions Escalate, Oil Prices Rise
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) experienced a significant downturn as the KSE-100 index plummeted by over 6,000 points amid renewed tensions between the United States and Iran. The benchmark index o...

item.title: Overhauling the Pip System: A Progressive Approach to Disability Benefits
item.description: The article critiques the UK's disability benefits system, particularly the Personal Independence Payment (Pip), following the damning Timms report. It highlights how the current points-based assessme...

item.title: Madhya Pradesh UCC Panel Recommends Excluding Adivasis from Uniform Civil Code Bill
item.description: A committee formed to draft a Uniform Civil Code (UCC) for Madhya Pradesh, under BJP rule, has recommended excluding Adivasis from the proposed legislation. The UCC aims to establish a common legal fr...

item.title: Pharmacy Council Targets Unauthorized Medical Practices in Drug Shops
item.description: The Tanzania Pharmacy Council has launched a crackdown on pharmaceutical outlets operating beyond regulatory guidelines, aiming to protect public health. The initiative targets pharmacies and drug sho...

item.title: ICE's failure to secure crime scene after deadly shooting sparks Rachel Maddow's criticism
item.description: Rachel Maddow's Monday night show focused on the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) shooting of a Colombian man in Biddeford, Maine, which agents claimed was in self-defense but video evid...
